# AskUCP Agency

> AI visibility and agentic commerce consulting for ecommerce stores.

AskUCP Agency helps ecommerce teams become visible, cited, and ready for AI-driven discovery and buying flows.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://askucp.agency/
- FAQ: https://askucp.agency/faq

## Topics

- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- AI search optimization
- Ecommerce AI visibility
- llms.txt
- Schema.org structured data
- UCP
- ACP
- Agentic commerce readiness

## Intended Audience

- Ecommerce founders
- Store owners
- Growth leaders
- Ecommerce operators
- Developers working on store infrastructure

## Contact

- Email: kevin@100toolkit.com
